summary: Iteration 4 frontend tests for STACK VALUE derived row, avatar object-contain & sizing, folder tile auto-stretch, folder double-click entry, and regressions. All 16 assertions passed.
passed: STACK VALUE row visible with text '150 g (50g × 3)' when value field active + parseable + stack>1
STACK VALUE hidden when value is non-numeric ('priceless')
STACK VALUE hidden when Value field removed from item
Inventory character avatar uses object-contain class and stays within 180x180 box (measured ~86x86)
Roster character card avatar uses max-w-full max-h-full object-contain (capped 80x80 container)
Folder tile auto-stretches: width grew from 260px (short name) to 535px after renaming to 'The Royal Spymasters Personal Vault'; input width ~407px fits inside tile
Multiple folders in folder-row flex-wrap container; 'DOUBLE-CLICK A FOLDER TO ENTER' hint visible
Double-click on folder body (folder icon) descends into folder; breadcrumb shows folder name
Regressions OK: new-item-btn, search-input, sort-name-asc, sort-manual, tier-chip-Expert, open-settings-btn → add-category-btn visible
